title: League of Legends Patch 26.14 Notes
overview: Patch 26.14 is a broad balance pass headlined by a mage/marksman shake-up: Azir gets a big rune-interaction rework, Corki and Yunara pick up scaling, while Seraphine, Senna, and Locke take the hit. Item nerfs target Hextech Rocketbelt and the Immortal/Protoplasm sustain line, and there's a heavy ARAM and Arena tuning sweep.
summary: Azir's W now procs burn runes and items at full on-hit value — he's a real threat again.
Seraphine, Senna, and Locke all lost damage/utility scaling and drop in power.
Hextech Rocketbelt got a longer active cooldown and less AP — burst mages feel it.
Jungle Blue Buff now scales Ability Haste with level, and ARAM/Arena got sweeping augment tuning.

champions.summary: W soldiers now apply on-hit effects at full value
champions.details: Scorch, Liandry's Torment, Blackfire Torch, and Hextech Alternator now deal 100% damage on soldier hits (up from 50%), Conqueror stacks twice per hit, and R knocks back jungle monsters — if you're playing Azir, your poke and DPS scaling just jumped a tier.
champions.name: Azir

champions.summary: More AD growth and faster rocket recharge
champions.details: AD growth rises from 2 to 2.5 and R - Missile Barrage recharges from autos up to 6 seconds' worth (from 4), so a fed Corki keeps his Big One up more often.
champions.name: Corki

champions.summary: Stronger E damage and more R stat steal
champions.details: E - Death's Grasp jumps to 140 (+45% AP) at max and R - Realm of Death steals 13% of stats (from 10%), making Morde's 1v1 death realm noticeably harder to survive.
champions.name: Mordekaiser

champions.summary: E deals much more empowered-auto damage
champions.details: E - Tidecaller's Blessing scales to 80 damage per hit at max (from 60), so Nami's poke and all-in burst on her carry hit meaningfully harder.
champions.name: Nami

champions.details: AD growth increases from 2.5 to 3, giving Yunara stronger auto-attack damage as the game goes long.
champions.name: Yunara

champions.summary: R - Demacian Justice execute damage cut
champions.details: The flat true damage on his ult drops to 125/200/275 (from 150/250/350), so Garen's signature execute needs more missing health to close the kill.
champions.name: Garen

champions.summary: Less passive move speed and R resistances
champions.details: Hextech Capacitor move speed falls to 30 (from 40) and R - Mercury Hammer gives less bonus armor/MR, so Jayce is squishier and less slippery in melee form.
champions.name: Jayce

champions.summary: Q and W damage and duration reduced
champions.details: Q - Ritual Nails holds for only 4 seconds with lower nail and mark damage, and W - Soul Ignition's grey-health cap is cut, trimming Locke's overall trading power.
champions.name: Locke

champions.details: Q - High Note's AP ratio drops from 50% to 40%, so Seraphine's main poke and wave-clear scale worse with her AP builds.
champions.name: Seraphine

champions.summary: Weaker crit modifier and Q AP scaling
champions.details: Passive crit damage falls to 80% and Q - Piercing Darkness gets weaker AP slow (7% per 100 AP) and healing (35%), so scaling AP Senna both does less and sustains less.
champions.name: Senna

items.summary: Longer active cooldown and less AP
items.details: The dash active cooldown rises to 50s and AP drops to 60 (with a more health-focused build path), so burst mages relying on Rocketbelt for engage get it less often.
items.name: Hextech Rocketbelt

items.details: Above-50%-health damage drops to 4% and below-50% healing/shielding/regen to 12%, softening the item for bruisers who leaned on it.
items.name: Immortal Path

items.summary: Costs more with weaker floor stats
items.details: Cost climbs to 2600 and its minimum bonus health and healing drop, making the item weaker when you buy it early.
items.name: Protoplasm Harness

systems.summary: Blue Buff now scales Ability Haste with level
systems.details: Blue Buff grants 10/15/20 Ability Haste at levels 1/6/11 (up from a flat 10), so AP junglers and mid-laners get more spell uptime as the game progresses.

Dimension Shift, Poro Stampede, and Squishy Slappy Grab were buffed hard while Dropkick, Tooth Fairy, and Infernal Conduit were nerfed, and the augment RNG was reworked for variety — your ARAM power spikes depend heavily on which augments you roll now.

systems.summary: Large champion and item tuning pass
systems.details: A dozen champions including Gragas, Samira, and Swain got buffed while Ambessa was nerfed, and attack-speed items like Kraken Slayer and Rapid Firecannon were boosted — the Arena tier list shifted noticeably.

systems.summary: Cleaner buff bar and automatic remake votes
systems.details: Redundant buffs were removed from the buff bar, item buffs moved to inventory, and remake votes are now automatic instead of a manual /remake command, streamlining the in-game HUD.
